creator: phk@critter.tfs.com
text:
On my system
  
        /usr/src -> ../a/src

so when I "make world" I get obj directories:
  
        /usr/obj/./a/src/usr.sbin/watch
  
Whats even more bogus is that if I
        
        cd /usr/src/usr.sbin/ncrcontrol
        make obj

then it makes
        
        /usr/obj/usr/src/usr.sbin/ncrcontrol
